feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to connect BPA form with on premise S4 Hana?
Unable to reach runtime server deployment error in SAP BPA
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have been using BPA for a customer PoC and have deployed multiple versions of it till now with new changes. However, today I made some changes and tried deploying and I am getting this error:

I was hoping it was an error on my side and tried redeploying an older version which was previously deployed, but even that is not deploying and is giving me the same error, so I have a feeling this problem is from BPA side.

Can someone please help with this? Would be much appreciated. 

Thanks,

Aryan

entry.title: how to save mail as draft
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an use case where after processing I need to create response mail and save it in draft folder.

How can I save mail in an outlook folder using SAP BPA.

Regards,

entry.title: Stacked line chart in SBPA Visibility Scenario
entry.content:
Hi,

when creating a performance indicator in a visibility scenario in SAP Build Process Automation , one can select line chart as representation option

But then it is only possible to choose one measure and dimension, so there is no way to create a line chart with multiple lines !?
E.g. "Number of Instances with Attribute1 = A" and "Number of Instances with Attribute1 = B" as two different lines plotted against the Start Time.

Does anyone know how to produce such a plot in the Visibility Scenario?

Or is this a planned functionality that will be released (soon)?

entry.title: How to send an email with attachment using outlook sdk in sap BPA.
entry.content:
I have a requirement where we are Rendering a PDF form, we are getting the result from this action. now when we are trying to send the email with file content as attachment getting error file not found.

I am not sure how we have to send the file content as attachment as without attachment the automation is working without error.

 

#SAP #BTP #BPA

entry.title: How to transport SAP Build Process Automation project from Dev subaccount to quality subaccount
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

Is it possible to transport SAP Build Process Automation Project from Dev subaccount to quality Subaccount by exporting the project as .mtar file and importing the same into quality subaccount.

when i tried the same by importing to quality subaccount, the definition id still pointing to the dev subaccount.

Regards,

Naveen Kishore

entry.title: SAP Build with SAP Gen AI (Joule)
entry.content:
How can i create a mobile application with SAP Build App for a user to chat with Joule and then start a process in SAP Build Process Automation? EX: A field employee must deactivate an equipment for maintenance. He uses a mobile app (SAP Build App or other solution), calls and informs Joule about the serial number of this equipment ( existing in a S/4 HANA CLoud Private edition 2024) . After that, Joule starts a process automation passing the information of this equipment to an approval task of his supervisor who then receives the task in the build process automation.

Is that possible to achieve that today?

entry.title: Can not select input parameter for Action in Business Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am following below blog to replicate the same for employee relocation request - process automation.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/create-workflow-steps-using-sap-build-process-automation/ba-p/13575948

1. i have created the form
2. i have created the action and tested which works fine.
3. in the process i placed the action below form.
4. when action is placed it expects mandt field where i have to provide employee ID, so i selected input then the side panel displays fields available in the form, but i can not able to select.

process overview:

Fields in the form:
form

 


actions input selection from fields in form:
input for action not enabled

 

 

 

Kindly let me know what is the issue and where i am missing. Please help

Thanks,
Gowtham

entry.title: Use Azure AD groups as recipient groups in SBPA
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

 

is it possible to use Azure AD groups as recipient groups in SBPA process approval user task while specifying recipient's , where IAS will act as proxy and delegate authentication from corporate IDP and IAS user store is disabled, will this setup works ,where Azure Ad group can be directly specified in the SBPA approval user task ?

Thanks,
Siddharth

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Cloud Identity Services

entry.title: Seeking a dependency for SAP API Proxy bundle generation similar to openapi2apigee.
Include Logo on Request Form in SBPA
entry.content:
Hello, 

Is it possible to include a logo on the request form in SBPA?

A similar question was asked in 2022 and the reply was that this was in Roadmap, but no further updates.

SAP Build Process Automation - Adding Logo in a form 

@Archana 

Any additional info on this is very welcome!

Best Regards

Roger

entry.title: Filter Get Request Data
entry.content:
Hello, 

As the Get requests are used to display data dynamically on a SBPA form, is there a way we can filter one field's data based on another field's input? Because even if I create actions that require an input, there is no possibility to map that input on the form. 

Thank you

Roger

entry.title: Get Requests data in F4 help
entry.content:
Hello, 

Is it possible to include an F4 search functionality on input fields of the form instead of a dropdown? 

Thank you

Roger

entry.title: Nested Lists on SBPA
entry.content:
Hello, 

On PO item level, in order to upload item text data or account assignment data, we need to bind a list type table in the inputs of the action. Which means, we need to be able to add a list (for item text and account assignment) inside a list (already created for line items on a PO). But on the form, it is not possible to create a nested list ie. list within a list. And the Input section of Post PO action does not provide the ability to do single item binding for these lists. In this case, could you please advise how we bind the data to these type of lists within line item in the inputs section of the action? 

Thank you

Roger

entry.title: unable to Create multiple templates with different language in form service by adobe.
entry.content:
My requirement is to create a form which will be sent to vendors in there respective language.

followed below steps:-

1. open Sap form services by adobe overview.

2. In template store created a form and added a template in germen lang.

3. now i am trying to add same template with same template name but with different lang, error is getting encountered. 

Now i looked over the sap help document and there it is written.

https://help.sap.com/docs/forms-service-by-adobe/sap-forms-service-cf/manage-forms-templates-and-schemas-ui

So my question, is it possible to have a single template with same name with different language assigned. if not how do i achieve my requirement. 

Also below highlighted point was not visible in the UI of optional data.

 

 

 

additional information, these forms are going to be utilized in SAP Build process automation .

entry.title: Unable to register SAP Desktop Agent 3
entry.content:
Installed Desktop Agent 3 but unable to Activate it.  I followed the steps in https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-setup-desktop-3-0-agent.html

Step 4 Register the Desktop Agent on your tenant - tried both Automatic and Manual options but nothing worked. As stated in Step 4 Point 5 - Confirm the tenant configuration. I tried to Activate it. It's opening the browser popup to authenticate and showing it as Login Successful but it's not activating it.

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation: Issue with Action Field Mapping
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am encountering an issue when mapping a body field with the type "object" in an Action to a Process in SAP Build Process Automation. Fields with the type "object" do not appear in the input of the Action. Is this a limitation, or are there alternative solutions? From what I understand, the "object" type in SAP Build Process is treated as type ANY when processed using Custom Script. However, instead of showing the input as type ANY, the Action hides it entirely.

Image action body field

Image Action mapping in Process (Only fields type sting available)

Thank a lot.

entry.title: Unable to install Desktop Agent 3 in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am doing the tutorial Install and setup Desktop Agent 3 -  https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-setup-desktop-3-0-agent.html.

In Step 2, point 1, when I go to the Control Tower tab and select the option Agent Update, I see that its blank as shown in the below screen. I don't see, "Enter Secret ID to configure agent update". I am an S user and hence chose the option Automatically.  Can you please help in fixing this issue.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Generate an ID number in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I am creating a process automation form in SAP Build Process Automation. I am trying to configure the form to generate an auto-generated sequential ID number and send it by email to the approver.

I used the script option, but it does not seem to be working.

Do you have any guidelines on how to achieve this?

entry.title: How to set up Manage Sales Order ( Live Process Project ) in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
We are in the process of implementing the Manage Sales Order (Live Process Project) in SAP Build Process Automation, but we have a few queries regarding the configuration setup:

 


1. In the attached screenshot, we can see that the functionality is typically achieved using Workflow Management. However, the documentation mentions that this functionality can be achieved either by Workflow Management or Build Process Automation. Could you please provide the process flow steps for achieving this functionality using Build Process Automation?

 

2. In the Functionality Diagram, Event Mesh is part of Workflow. Since we are following Build Process Automation, do we need to set up Event Mesh, or is it already available within Build Process Automation? If it's available, where can we check this functionality? If it's not available, could you guide us on how and where to set it up?

 

3. For configuring Cloud Integration, please provide the Configuration Setup Guide and explain how it works in the context of SAP Build Process Automation.

 

4. Is it mandatory to configure an Email Destination in SAP BTP, or is it already preconfigured in the Build Process Automation project?

 

5. Is it mandatory to configure Workflow Destinations in SAP BTP for SAP Build Process Automation, or is this not required since we are only using Build Process Automation and not Workflow?

 

6. Is Process Visibility Service required in Build Process Automation? If so, how can we set it up, as the service is not available in BTP? 

 

7. Is configuring a Business Rules Destination required in Build Process Automation? If yes, could you please clarify the URL that needs to be provided? The Setup Guide mentions the URL part but doesn’t provide full details, so we would appreciate it if you could provide the complete URL format. 

 

could you please guide us on how to set up the necessary configurations .

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Event Mesh SAP Cloud for Customer integration with SAP S/4HANA  SAP Business Workflow SAP Workflow Management SAP Workflow Management, process visibility capability 

Thanks & Regards,
Vijay Kumar.
